calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. The Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Government Code 68608(b). JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Continued To Jul-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-16-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and counsel will be reported to the State Bar pursuant to Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2019 Continued To May-14-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to May-14-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stanley Goff, Esq. 415-571-9570 for Plaintiff Kenneth Massingale.
Brent Oesterblad, Esq. 623-256-1664 Defendant in Pro Per through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT CHARLES RODRICK, BRENT OESTERBLAD's Motion To Strike.

Taken under Submission. Both sides to submit proposed orders by today.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
